title: bromus inermis subsp. pumpellianus
intro: Bromus inermis subsp. pumpellianus, also known as smooth brome, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of smooth brome include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Smooth brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal benefits.
